name: Margin Calculator
description: Calculate profit margin percentage and profit amount from cost and selling price.
formula: Margin % = ((sellingPrice - cost) / sellingPrice) * 100, Profit = sellingPrice - cost
formulaDescription: Margin is the percentage profit on the selling price.

example.explanation: Profit of $50 on $150 selling price gives 33.33% margin.

faqs.question: What is profit margin?
faqs.answer: Profit margin is the percentage of profit relative to the selling price.
